metadata.title: Amigurumi Pattern & Handmade Store
metadata.description: A secure bilingual foundation for handmade goods and crochet patterns.

catalog.title: Shop crochet goods
catalog.intro: Browse downloadable patterns and finished handmade pieces available in your market.
catalog.emptyBody: Try changing your search or filters.

product.digitalWarning: Digital pattern, not a finished item
product.unavailableBody: This product is published, but it cannot be purchased in your active market.

home.title: Handmade crochet patterns and keepsakes
home.intro: A calm bilingual foundation for a future handmade storefront serving Vietnam and international customers.
home.localizedBody: Public pages use explicit Vietnamese and English routes with equivalent language switching.
home.secureBody: Account and admin access will build on server-side checks and database-owned roles.
home.studioBody: The visual system keeps handmade character restrained, readable, and trustworthy.

auth.genericError: We could not complete that request. Check the details and try again.

signIn.title: Sign in
signIn.intro: Use your email and password to enter your account.

register.title: Create account
register.intro: Create an account for future order history and secure access.
register.successBody: If confirmation is required, use the link we sent to finish setting up your account.

forgotPassword.title: Reset password
forgotPassword.intro: Enter your email and we will send reset instructions if the account exists.
forgotPassword.successBody: If that email can receive account mail, reset instructions will arrive shortly.

resetPassword.title: Choose a new password
resetPassword.intro: Enter a new password after opening a valid recovery link.
resetPassword.successBody: Your password was updated. You can continue with your account.
resetPassword.invalidRecovery: This recovery link is no longer valid. Request a new password reset link.

account.title: Account
account.intro: Your Phase 1 account boundary is active.
